channel.title: Real Estate Affordability on Pro Repair Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Real Estate Affordability on Pro Repair Guide

item.title: Florida Homeownership Costs: 2024 Reality Check
item.description: Florida’s housing market has surged—median prices near $425K. Discover regional costs, insurance spikes, and hidden expenses for buyers & residents.

item.title: Florida Real Estate Costs: A Regional Breakdown
item.description: Explore Florida’s housing market complexities: regional price disparities, insurance costs, and true affordability beyond sticker prices.

item.title: Florida Real Estate 2024: Costs, Regions & Affordability
item.description: Explore Florida's 2024 housing market: median prices by region, inventory challenges, and key affordability factors for buyers.
